trades.reasoning: AI GPU leader showing RSI 68.4 in ideal momentum zone with MACD bullish crossover — in a risk-on day with NASDAQ +3%, NVDA is the highest-quality name available to capture the move
Nuclear energy/small modular reactors sector is a thematic momentum play with RSI 68.1, MACD bullish histogram rising, and a cheap $10.93 price that allows meaningful share count from remaining cash
Telehealth with RSI 66.7 in bullish zone, all three momentum signals firing, and $29.91 price allows a clean entry — healthcare growth names tend to outperform in risk-on regimes

decisions.briefing: Broad market is firmly risk-on today with NASDAQ surging 3% and S&P up 1.9%, creating ideal conditions for momentum names. With 4 open slots and $619 in cash, I'm filling 3 slots with NVDA (AI/GPU), SMR (nuclear energy), and HIMS (telehealth) — all score-95 candidates in the RSI 55-70 sweet spot with clean MACD signals. Existing positions in QQQ, EAT, OLED, WT, ROAD, and NOK are held; NOK is down ~1.7% from cost but well above its stop-loss floor.

market_education.summary_en: Markets rallied sharply today with the NASDAQ gaining 3% and the S&P 500 climbing 1.9%, driven by continued optimism around artificial intelligence infrastructure spending and easing macroeconomic concerns. Technology and growth stocks led the advance as investor appetite for risk returned in force, with semiconductor and AI-adjacent names posting outsized gains. The broad participation across sectors — from tech to healthcare to energy — signals a genuine risk-on rotation rather than a narrow sector squeeze.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日大幅走高，納斯達克指數上漲3%，標普500指數上升1.9%，主要受惠於市場對人工智能基礎設施投資前景持續樂觀，以及宏觀經濟憂慮緩解。科技與成長股領漲，半導體及AI相關板塊表現尤為突出。從科技到醫療再到能源，各板塊普遍參與上漲，顯示此次反彈屬於實質性的風險偏好回歸，而非單一板塊的短暫軋空行情。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing is the strategy of buying stocks that have recently been rising and showing strong price trends, based on the idea that assets that have performed well tend to continue performing well in the short term. Traders look for signals like RSI in the 55-70 range (bullish but not overbought) and MACD crossovers to identify stocks with sustainable upward momentum. Today's risk-on market is a textbook environment for momentum strategies, which is why all top candidates share the same set of bullish technical signals.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期持續上漲、技術走勢強勁的股票，其邏輯在於表現優秀的資產短期內往往延續強勢。交易者透過觀察RSI處於55至70的健康動能區間（強勢但未過熱）以及MACD黃金交叉等信號，篩選具備持續上行動力的標的。今日市場全面風險偏好回歸，正是動能投資策略發揮效用的典型環境，這也是為何今日評分最高的候選股均呈現出相同一組看漲技術信號。
